mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO news_data ( source_id, title, pub_date, content_text, deleted, create_time, update_time ) VALUES
( #{item.sourceId}, #{item.title}, #{item.pubDate}, #{item.contentText}, 0, NOW(), NOW() )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE content_text = VALUES(content_text), pub_date = VALUES(pub_date), title = IF(VALUES(title) IS NULL OR VALUES(title) = '', title, VALUES(title)), deleted = 0, update_time = NOW()
